title: Citrusy Dense Brazilian Potatoe Bun Stir-fry
description: This dish combines the comforting texture of dense potatoe buns with a burst of citrus flavors in a one-pot meal perfect for breakfast or brunch.

ingredients.name: Jalapeno peppers, seeded and finely chopped

instructions: Preheat oven to 350°F (175°C). Grease a large baking dish.
Knead the potatoe buns with olive oil until they are evenly coated, forming them into patties. Arrange on the greased dish.
In a skillet or wok over medium heat, sauté onion and garlic until translucent. Add jalapeno peppers and continue cooking for about 5 minutes until softened.
Fold in lemon juice and citrus zest to taste. Mix thoroughly with the vegetable mixture.
Pour vegetable mixture evenly over the potatoe buns, making sure they are fully coated. Place in preheated oven and bake for 18-20 minutes or until golden brown.
Let sit for a few minutes before serving. Garnish with fresh parsley if desired.
